description_long: This is a modern, compact sofa with a deep blue fabric upholstery and a minimalist design. The sofa features a single, continuous seat cushion and a slightly curved backrest that wraps around the sides, forming integrated armrests. The armrests are gently rounded and rise to the same height as the backrest, creating a unified silhouette. The sofa stands on four slender, light-colored wooden legs that are slightly angled outward, giving it a light and airy appearance. The upholstery appears smooth and uniform, with no visible tufting or decorative stitching. This piece would fit well in urban parks, public waiting areas, or contemporary outdoor lounges.
description: A modern blue sofa with smooth upholstery, curved backrest and armrests, and four angled wooden legs. Its compact, unified design is both stylish and functional.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width, single seat cushion, and the curved backrest with integrated armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sofa's depth, the gentle curve of the backrest, and the outward angle of the front and rear legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, rounded backrest and the symmetry of the sofa's design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the sofa's profile and the consistent curvature of the back and armrest.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Single, continuous seat cushion and a single, continuous backrest cushion, both attached and uniform in size.
attribute_armrest_style: Integrated, gently rounded armrests at the same height as the backrest, forming a seamless curve with no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four exposed, slender, light wood legs, slightly angled outward, positioned at the corners for stability.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, continuous, curved backrest that wraps around the sides, forming a unified structure with the armrests.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid blue fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible pattern, tufting, or decorative stitching.
